docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TEGSCO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CARMAX AUTO FINANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-27-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC (DAN SCANLAN) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARMAX AUTO FINANCE IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARMAX AUTO FINANCE IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES
